response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and clear customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise GenAI contexts.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven ability to lead complex full-stack projects across diverse tech stacks and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in resume
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership in GenAI delivery
AI experience appears recent and not clearly sustained over 8+ years as required
